sentences.translation: Salih je trebao novac za popravku auta.
sentences.translationEn: Salih needed money to repair his car.

sentences.translation: Zatražio je od brata da mu pozajmi.
sentences.translationEn: He asked his brother to lend him money.

sentences.translation: Brat mu je s radošću dao iznos.
sentences.translationEn: The brother gave him the amount happily.

sentences.arabic: وَعَدَ صَالِحٌ بِرَدِّ المَبْلَغِ فِي نِهَايَةِ الشَّهْرِ.
sentences.translation: Salih je obećao da će vratiti iznos krajem mjeseca.
sentences.translationEn: Salih promised to return the amount at the end of the month.
